name: Ice Cream Conecakes
recipeIngredient: 1 package cake mix, prepared as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Place the ice cream cones in muffin tins or on a large flat baking sheet.
3. Fill each cup about halfway with cake batter. Be careful not to overfill so the batter doesn't run down the sides of the cones.
4. Bake for 18 to 23 minutes, or until the center springs back when lightly touched (follow package instructions for cupcakes).
5. Frost as desired once cooled.
6. These are best enjoyed on the same day; otherwise, the cone may become soggy. Approximately 20 cones can be made from one box of cake mix.
Originally posted on GEnie by M.CARMAIN1 [Melinda]
